pages.text: I am the middle one. Not the first born. Not the last born. The one in the middle!

blocks.text: I am the middle one. Not the first born. Not the last born.

pages.text: The one in the middle can be easy to forget.

blocks.text: The one in the middle can be easy to forget.

pages.text: But that’s okay because I am also the one with IDEAS!

blocks.text: But that’s okay because I am also the one with IDEAS!

pages.text: Look what I can make from just this cardboard box! A BEAUTIFUL house… with real doors and windows.

blocks.text: Look what I can make from just this cardboard box!
A BEAUTIFUL house… with real doors and windows.

pages.text: My house has an extra special bed, and a MAGIC SLIDE.

blocks.text: My house has an extra special bed, and a MAGIC SLIDE.

pages.text: Some days my house is also a shop.

blocks.text: Some days my house is also a shop.

pages.text: And on other days it’s a VERY FANTASTIC show.

blocks.text: And on other days it’s a VERY FANTASTIC show.

pages.text: Sometimes my house is just for me!

blocks.text: Sometimes my house is just for me!

pages.text: And sometimes it’s a house for three! I am the middle one. Not the first born. Not the last born. The one in the middle! And that’s the best place for me.

blocks.text: And sometimes it’s a house for three!
I am the middle one. Not the first born. Not the last born.
And that’s the best place for me.
